regard.example: I regard him as a good friend.
She has high regard for her teacher.

region.example: This region is famous for its tea.

regular.example: He is a regular customer at the cafe.
regular.example_zh: 他是這家咖啡館的常客。

regular.example: I'll have a regular coffee, please.

relate.example: This story relates to my own life.
relate.example_zh: 這個故事和我自己的生活有關。

relate.example: I can relate to how you feel.

relation.example: There is a close relation between the two.

religion.example: People of every religion are welcome.
religion.example_zh: 各種宗教信仰的人都歡迎。

remove.example: Please remove your shoes at the door.

rent.example: They rent a small apartment downtown.
rent.example_zh: 他們在市中心租了一間小公寓。

rent.example: The rent is due at the end of the month.

repair.example: The road is closed for repairs.

reply.example: Please reply to my email soon.
I am still waiting for her reply.

require.example: This job requires a lot of patience.
require.example_zh: 這份工作需要很大的耐心。

respect.example: She earned the respect of her team.

respond.example: She responded to my question quickly.
respond.example_zh: 她很快回答了我的問題。

responsible.example: He is responsible for cleaning the room.

restroom.example: The restroom is on the second floor.

result.example: We are happy with the test results.
result.example_zh: 我們對測驗結果很滿意。

return.example: Please return the book to the library.
We look forward to your return.

review.example: We review the lesson before the test.
review.example_zh: 我們在考試前複習功課。

riches.example: Health is more valuable than riches.

rocky.example: The path up the hill was rocky.

role.example: She played the role of the queen.
Parents play an important role in education.
role.example_zh: 父母在教育中扮演重要的角色。

rooster.example: The rooster crows early in the morning.

rub.example: She rubbed her eyes when she woke up.
He rubbed cream on his hands.

rubber.example: The boots are made of rubber.

rubber.example_zh: 我可以借你的橡皮擦嗎？

rude.example: It is rude to interrupt people.
rude.example_zh: 打斷別人說話很沒禮貌。

safety.example: Wear a seatbelt for your safety.
safety.example_zh: 為了安全請繫上安全帶。

sail.example: The boat sailed across the lake.
The white sail caught the wind.

sailor.example: The sailor worked hard on the ship.

salesperson-salesman-saleswoman.example: The salesperson showed us many shoes.
salesperson-salesman-saleswoman.example_zh: 售貨員拿了許多鞋子給我們看。

salty.example: The soup is too salty for me.

sample.example: She gave me a free sample of cheese.
sample.example_zh: 她給了我一份免費的起司試吃品。

sample.example: We sampled several cakes at the shop.
sample.example_zh: 我們在店裡試吃了好幾種蛋糕。

sand.example: The children played in the sand.

sandwich.example: I made a ham sandwich for lunch.
sandwich.example_zh: 我做了火腿三明治當午餐。

satisfy.example: The meal did not satisfy his hunger.
satisfy.example_zh: 這頓飯沒能填飽他的肚子。

saw.example: He cut the wood with a saw.
She sawed the board in half.

scare.example: The loud noise scared the baby.
scare.example_zh: 巨大的聲響嚇到了寶寶。

scare.example: The news gave us a scare.
scare.example_zh: 這消息讓我們嚇了一跳。

scared.example: She was scared of the dark.

scene.example: The first scene of the play was funny.
scene.example_zh: 這齣戲的第一場很有趣。

schedule.example: My schedule is full this week.
The meeting is scheduled for Monday.

scooter.example: She rides a scooter to school.

score.example: He got a high score on the test.
She scored two goals in the game.

screen.example: The movie screen is very big.
There is a screen on the window to keep bugs out.

seafood.example: We ordered fresh seafood at the restaurant.
seafood.example_zh: 我們在餐廳點了新鮮的海鮮。

search.example: They searched everywhere for the lost dog.
search.example_zh: 他們到處尋找走失的狗。

search.example: The search for the keys took an hour.

secondary.example: She teaches at a secondary school.

secret.example: They met in a secret place.
secret.example_zh: 他們在一個秘密的地方碰面。

section.example: This section of the book is about animals.
section.example_zh: 這本書的這一部分是關於動物的。

seek.example: They seek help from the teacher.

seesaw.example: The children played on the seesaw.

selection.example: The selection of a leader takes time.
The store has a good selection of toys.
selection.example_zh: 這家店的玩具種類很多。

selfish.example: Don't be selfish; share with others.

sense.example: Dogs have a strong sense of smell.
She sensed that something was wrong.

sensitive.example: Her skin is very sensitive to the sun.
sensitive.example_zh: 她的皮膚對陽光很敏感。

sensitive.example: He is sensitive to others' feelings.

separate.example: Please separate the trash from the paper.

servant.example: The servant brought tea to the guests.

serve.example: The restaurant serves breakfast all day.
serve.example_zh: 這家餐廳全天供應早餐。

serve.example: He served as a teacher for ten years.

settle.example: They settled in a small town by the sea.
settle.example_zh: 他們在海邊的小鎮定居。
他們和平地解決了爭執。

sex.example: The form asks for your name and sex.
sex.example_zh: 表格上要填姓名和性別。

shame.example: What a shame that you missed the show.
He felt shame for telling a lie.

shark.example: A shark has very sharp teeth.
shark.example_zh: 鯊魚有非常鋒利的牙齒。
